name: puglit
description: The opinionated SaaS factory — describe your idea, get a complete deployable SaaS in a GitHub repo.

scripts.note: Phase 1 = extract the Spine into ./spine. CLI (create-puglit) is Phase 2.
scripts.validate-examples: tsc --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --target ES2021 examples/*.config.ts spine/domain.config.ts
